name: Overnight French Toast
recipeIngredient: 1 loaf of french bread, cut into
recipeInstructions:
Pour the mixture over the bread and refrigerate overnight. In the morning, combine:
20 oz frozen whole strawberries
4 ripe bananas, sliced
1 cup sugar
1 tbsp apple pie spice
Put the fruit mixture in a large greased baking dish and top with the prepared bread. Sprinkle with cinnamon-sugar. Bake at 450°F for 20 to 25 minutes. To serve, lift out the bread slices and place on plates. Spoon the fruit on top and serve. Serves 4-5.
